event: close contact with person with pulmonary tuberculosis
pulmonary auscultation revealed diffuse crackles left lung
brain MRI multiple ring-shaped lesions posterior hemispheres
lumbar puncture opening pressure 30 cm H2O
abdominal CT loculated multiseptated gas-fluid collection gastric fundus
exploratory laparotomy demonstrated complete stomach necrosis
oral anti-TB therapy switched to IV amikacin
histopathology gastric tissue H&E stain vascular thrombosis
isoniazid plus rifampin continued via J-tube
liposomal amphotericin B switched to posaconazole oral suspension
